body.usage: General text, Table data, Form labels

code.usage: API endpoints, JSON responses, Code snippets (Educational Focus)

scale.code: text-sm font-mono bg-muted/50 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-primary

primary.name: Electric Orange (Appetite & Action)
primary.usage: Primary Buttons, Active States, Key Highlights

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-orange-900/20 font-medium rounded-lg transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-700 text-white border border-zinc-700 rounded-lg

cards.stat_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/50 p-6 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
cards.product_card: group rounded-xl border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900 overflow-hidden hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-orange-900/10 transition-all duration-300

tables.header: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-zinc-500 font-medium bg-zinc-900/50

badges.category: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 border border-zinc-700
badges.highlight: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-orange-500/10 text-orange-400 border border-orange-500/20

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME: Force Dark Mode by default. Add 'dark' class to html/body tag immediately.
2. LANGUAGE: All user-facing text (Buttons, Labels, Placeholders) MUST be in Portuguese (PT-BR).
3. EDUCATIONAL: The API Documentation page is CRITICAL. It must look like Stripe/Twilio docs (Left nav, Center content, Right code). Use JetBrains Mono for all code blocks.
4. VISUALS: Use the 'noise_texture' as a subtle overlay on the body background to prevent the 'flat dark mode' look.
5. DATA: Seed the database with the provided product images and descriptions in Portuguese.
6. COMPONENTS: Use existing Shadcn components but styled with the 'Midnight Gastronomy' palette (Orange/Zinc). Override default blue focus rings with orange.
7. DESTACADO: The 'destacado' (featured) boolean should trigger a visual highlight (e.g., a glowing border or a 'Chef's Choice' badge) on the product card.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
